name: IGEL OS 12 enterprise security baseline
description: Security and management baseline for IGEL OS 12 thin clients in enterprise environments. Covers firmware version, UMS management, screen lock, USB policy, firewall, and certificate trust.

checks.title: IGEL OS minimum firmware version
checks.remediation: Update IGEL OS firmware via UMS to at least version 12.3.0.

checks.title: Device managed by UMS
checks.remediation: Register the device in IGEL Universal Management Suite.

checks.title: UMS profile applied
checks.remediation: Assign and apply an approved configuration profile via UMS.

checks.title: Screen lock enabled
checks.remediation: Enable screen lock in UMS profile under Sessions > Screen Lock.

checks.title: Screen lock timeout max 10 minutes
checks.remediation: Set screen lock timeout to 10 minutes or less in UMS profile.

checks.title: USB mass storage disabled
checks.remediation: Disable USB mass storage in UMS profile under System > Firmware Customization > Features.

checks.title: Auto-login disabled
checks.remediation: Disable auto-login in UMS profile under Security > Logon.

checks.title: Firewall enabled
checks.remediation: Enable the IGEL OS firewall in UMS profile under Network > Firewall.

checks.title: Network online
checks.remediation: Verify network connectivity and DHCP/DNS configuration.

checks.title: Root CA must be present
checks.remediation: Install approved root certificate bundle via UMS.

checks.title: Root CA must exist in certificate details
checks.remediation: Verify the root CA is present in the expected trust store.

checks.title: Root CA must not expire soon
checks.remediation: Renew or replace the certificate before expiry.
